extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked on Selvino descent with 40km remaining, built 1-minute gap through 19 hairpins where he'd previously struggled, held off elite chase group
tactical_patterns: Adam Yates initiated selection on climb before Selvino, forcing elite riders to chase rather than organize controlled pursuit.
POGACAR reversed his weakness from 2021, attacking on Selvino's 19-hairpin descent rather than struggling, gaining 45 seconds descending.
UAE isolated POGACAR early with no teammates, yet he executed solo effort over 40km against organized chase groups.
Olympic champion CARAPAZ dropped on key climb selection, showing road race form doesn't translate to late-season monument climbing.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: cramped at 12km to go but recovered to maintain 1-minute gap, showing superior crisis management in monuments
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: crashed 21km in and never featured in decisive selections, eliminated before Adam Yates initiated key move
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: animated winning move by attacking first on climb before Selvino, controlling tempo for brother Simon
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: Olympic champion dropped when elite group formed, significant gap between championship and monument-specific fitness
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: first major casualty before climb selections began, suggesting Movistar's preparation failed
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: third place in final race for Jumbo-Visma before transfer, showed loyalty but couldn't match POGACAR's descent attack
